//-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_swap() {\n    TradeCsvLoader test = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ValueWithFailures<List<Trade>> trades = test.load(FILE);\n\n    List<SwapTrade> filtered = trades.getValue().stream()\n        .flatMap(filtering(SwapTrade.class))\n        .collect(toImmutableList());\n    assertThat(filtered).hasSize(NUMBER_SWAPS);\n\n    SwapTrade expected0 = expectedSwap0();\n    SwapTrade expected1 = expectedSwap1();\n    SwapTrade expected2 = expectedSwap2();\n    SwapTrade expected3 = expectedSwap3();\n    SwapTrade expected4 = expectedSwap4();\n    SwapTrade expected5 = expectedSwap5();\n    SwapTrade expected6 = expectedSwap6();\n    SwapTrade expected7 = expectedSwap7();\n\n    assertBeanEquals(expected0, filtered.get(0));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected1, filtered.get(1));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected2, filtered.get(2));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected3, filtered.get(3));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected4, filtered.get(4));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected5, filtered.get(5));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected6, filtered.get(6));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected7, filtered.get(7));\n\n    checkRoundtrip(\n        SwapTrade.class, filtered, expected0, expected1, expected2, expected3, expected4, expected5, expected6, expected7);\n  }\n\n  private SwapTrade expectedSwap0() {\n    return FixedIborSwapConventions.GBP_FIXED_1Y_LIBOR_3M\n        .createTrade(date(2017, 6, 1), Period.ofMonths(1), Tenor.ofYears(5), BUY, 2_000_000, 0.004, REF_DATA)\n        .toBuilder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123411\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .build())\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  private SwapTrade expectedSwap1() {\n    return FixedIborSwapConventions.GBP_FIXED_6M_LIBOR_6M\n        .toTrade(date(2017, 6, 1), date(2017, 8, 1), date(2022, 8, 1), BUY, 3_100_000, -0.0001)\n        .toBuilder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123412\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .build())\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  private SwapTrade expectedSwap2() {\n    NotionalSchedule notionalSchedule = NotionalSchedule.of(GBP,\n        ValueSchedule.of(\n            5_000_000,\n            ValueStep.of(date(2018, 8, 1), ValueAdjustment.ofReplace(4_000_000)),\n            ValueStep.of(date(2019, 8, 1), ValueAdjustment.ofReplace(3_000_000)),\n            ValueStep.of(date(2020, 8, 1), ValueAdjustment.ofReplace(2_000_000)),\n            ValueStep.of(date(2021, 8, 1), ValueAdjustment.ofReplace(1_000_000))));\n    Swap expectedSwap = Swap.builder()\n        .legs(\n            RateCalculationSwapLeg.builder()\n                .payReceive(PAY)\n                .accrualSchedule(PeriodicSchedule.builder()\n                    .startDate(date(2017, 8, 1))\n                    .endDate(date(2022, 9, 1))\n                    .frequency(Frequency.P6M)\n                    .businessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.of(MODIFIED_FOLLOWING, GBLO))\n                    .stubConvention(StubConvention.LONG_FINAL)\n                    .build())\n                .paymentSchedule(PaymentSchedule.builder()\n                    .paymentFrequency(Frequency.P6M)\n                    .paymentDateOffset(DaysAdjustment.NONE)\n                    .build())\n                .notionalSchedule(notionalSchedule)\n                .calculation(FixedRateCalculation.builder()\n                    .rate(ValueSchedule.of(\n                        0.005,\n                        ValueStep.of(date(2018, 8, 1), ValueAdjustment.ofReplace(0.006)),\n                        ValueStep.of(date(2020, 8, 1), ValueAdjustment.ofReplace(0.007))))\n                    .dayCount(DayCounts.ACT_365F)\n                    .build())\n                .build(),\n            RateCalculationSwapLeg.builder()\n                .payReceive(RECEIVE)\n                .accrualSchedule(PeriodicSchedule.builder()\n                    .startDate(date(2017, 8, 1))\n                    .endDate(date(2022, 9, 1))\n                    .frequency(Frequency.P6M)\n                    .businessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.of(MODIFIED_FOLLOWING, GBLO))\n                    .stubConvention(StubConvention.LONG_FINAL)\n                    .build())\n                .paymentSchedule(PaymentSchedule.builder()\n                    .paymentFrequency(Frequency.P6M)\n                    .paymentDateOffset(DaysAdjustment.NONE)\n                    .build())\n                .notionalSchedule(notionalSchedule)\n                .calculation(IborRateCalculation.of(IborIndices.GBP_LIBOR_6M))\n                .build())\n        .build();\n    return SwapTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123413\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .build())\n        .product(expectedSwap)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  private SwapTrade expectedSwap3() {\n    return XCcyIborIborSwapConventions.GBP_LIBOR_3M_USD_LIBOR_3M\n        .createTrade(date(2017, 6, 1), Period.ofMonths(1), Tenor.TENOR_3Y, BUY, 2_000_000, 2_500_000, 0.006, REF_DATA)\n        .toBuilder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123414\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .build())\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  private SwapTrade expectedSwap4() {\n    Swap expectedSwap = Swap.builder()\n        .legs(\n            RateCalculationSwapLeg.builder()\n                .payReceive(PAY)\n                .accrualSchedule(PeriodicSchedule.builder()\n                    .startDate(date(2017, 8, 1))\n                    .endDate(date(2022, 8, 1))\n                    .frequency(Frequency.P3M)\n                    .businessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE)\n                    .stubConvention(StubConvention.SHORT_FINAL)\n                    .build())\n                .paymentSchedule(PaymentSchedule.builder()\n                    .paymentFrequency(Frequency.P3M)\n                    .paymentDateOffset(DaysAdjustment.NONE)\n                    .build())\n                .notionalSchedule(NotionalSchedule.of(GBP, 2_500_000))\n                .calculation(FixedRateCalculation.of(0.011, DayCounts.THIRTY_360_ISDA))\n                .build(),\n            RateCalculationSwapLeg.builder()\n                .payReceive(RECEIVE)\n                .accrualSchedule(PeriodicSchedule.builder()\n                    .startDate(date(2017, 8, 1))\n                    .endDate(date(2022, 8, 1))\n                    .frequency(Frequency.P3M)\n                    .businessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE)\n .frequency(Frequency.P12M)\n                    .businessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.of(FOLLOWING, GBLO))\n                    .stubConvention(StubConvention.SMART_INITIAL)\n                    .build())\n                .paymentSchedule(PaymentSchedule.builder()\n                    .paymentFrequency(Frequency.P12M)\n                    .paymentDateOffset(DaysAdjustment.NONE)\n                    .paymentRelativeTo(PaymentRelativeTo.PERIOD_END)\n                    .build())\n                .notionalSchedule(NotionalSchedule.builder()\n                    .currency(GBP)\n                    .amount(ValueSchedule.of(1_000_000))\n                    .build())\n                .calculation(FixedRateCalculation.builder()\n                    .dayCount(DayCounts.THIRTY_U_360)  // defaulted from CHF-LIBOR-6M\n                    .rate(ValueSchedule.of(0.011))\n                    .build())\n                .build(),\n            RateCalculationSwapLeg.builder()\n .frequency(Frequency.P6M)\n                    .businessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.of(FOLLOWING, GBLO))\n                    .stubConvention(StubConvention.SMART_INITIAL)\n      .build())\n                .notionalSchedule(NotionalSchedule.of(GBP, 1_000_000))\n                .calculation(IborRateCalculation.builder()\n                    .dayCount(DayCounts.ACT_360)\n                    .index(IborIndices.CHF_LIBOR_6M)\n                    .build())\n                .build())\n        .build();\n    SwapTrade expected = SwapTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"1234\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 1, 1))\n            .tradeTime(LocalTime.of(12, 30))\n //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_swaption() {\n    TradeCsvLoader test = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n    ValueWithFailures<List<Trade>> trades = test.load(FILE);\n\n    List<SwaptionTrade> filtered = trades.getValue().stream()\n        .flatMap(filtering(SwaptionTrade.class))\n        .collect(toImmutableList());\n    assertThat(filtered).hasSize(3);\n\n    SwaptionTrade expected0 = expectedSwaption0();\n    SwaptionTrade expected1 = expectedSwaption1();\n    SwaptionTrade expected2 = expectedSwaption2();\n\n    assertBeanEquals(expected0, filtered.get(0));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected1, filtered.get(1));\n    assertBeanEquals(expected2, filtered.get(2));\n\n    checkRoundtrip(\n        SwaptionTrade.class, filtered, expected0, expected1, expected2);\n  }\n\n  private SwaptionTrade expectedSwaption0() {\n    SwapTrade swapTrade = expectedSwap0();\n    Swaption swaption = Swaption.builder()\n        .longShort(LongShort.LONG)\n        .swaptionSettlement(CashSwaptionSettlement.of(date(2017, 7, 3), CashSwaptionSettlementMethod.PAR_YIELD))\n        .expiryDate(AdjustableDate.of(date(2017, 6, 30)))\n        .expiryTime(LocalTime.of(11, 0))\n        .expiryZone(ZoneId.of(\"Europe/London\"))\n        .underlying(swapTrade.getProduct())\n        .build();\n    Payment premium = Payment.of(CurrencyAmount.of(GBP, -1000), date(2017, 6, 3));\n    return SwaptionTrade.of(swapTrade.getInfo(), swaption, premium);\n  }\n\n  private SwaptionTrade expectedSwaption1() {\n    SwapTrade swapTrade = expectedSwap1();\n    Swaption swaption = Swaption.builder()\n        .longShort(LongShort.SHORT)\n        .swaptionSettlement(PhysicalSwaptionSettlement.DEFAULT)\n        .expiryDate(AdjustableDate.of(date(2017, 6, 30)))\n        .expiryTime(LocalTime.of(11, 0))\n        .expiryZone(ZoneId.of(\"Europe/London\"))\n        .underlying(swapTrade.getProduct())\n        .build();\n    Payment premium = Payment.of(CurrencyAmount.of(GBP, 1000), date(2017, 6, 3));\n    return SwaptionTrade.of(swapTrade.getInfo(), swaption, premium);\n  }\n\n  private SwaptionTrade expectedSwaption2() {\n    SwapTrade swapTrade = expectedSwap2();\n    Swaption swaption = Swaption.builder()\n        .longShort(LongShort.SHORT)\n        .swaptionSettlement(PhysicalSwaptionSettlement.DEFAULT)\n        .expiryDate(AdjustableDate.of(date(2017, 6, 30)))\n        .expiryTime(LocalTime.of(11, 0))\n        .expiryZone(ZoneId.of(\"Europe/London\"))\n        .underlying(swapTrade.getProduct())\n        .build();\n    Payment premium = Payment.of(CurrencyAmount.of(GBP, 0), date(2017, 6, 30));\n    return SwaptionTrade.of(swapTrade.getInfo(), swaption, premium);\n  }\n\n  private FxSingleTrade expectedFxSingle() {\n    double CurrencyAmount.of(USD, -notional * fxRate),\n            LocalDate.of(2014, 5, 13)));\n  }\n\n  private FxEuropeanOptionTrade expectedFxEuropeanOption() {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.builder()\n        .product(FxEuropeanOption.builder()\n            .longShort(SHORT)\n            .expiryDate(LocalDate.of(2014, 5, 9))\n            .expiryTime(LocalTime.of(13, 10))\n            .expiryZone(ZoneId.of(\"Z\"))\n            .underlying(expectedFxSingle().getProduct())\n            .build())\n        .premium(AdjustablePayment.of(Payment.of(CurrencyAmount.of(USD, 230.3), LocalDate.of(2014, 1, 12))))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  private FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade expectedFxSingleBarrierOptionWithRebate() {\n    return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.builder()\n CurrencyAmount.of(USD, 17.666)))\n        .premium(AdjustablePayment.of(Payment.of(CurrencyAmount.of(USD, 230.3), LocalDate.of(2014, 1, 12))))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  private FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade expectedFxSingleBarrierOptionWithoutRebate() {\n    return FxSingleBarrierOptionTrade.builder()\n        .product(FxSingleBarrierOption.of(\n            expectedFxEuropeanOption().getProduct(),\n            SimpleConstantContinuousBarrier.of(BarrierType.DOWN, KnockType.KNOCK_OUT, 17.2)))\n        .premium(AdjustablePayment.of(Payment.of(CurrencyAmount.of(USD, 230.3), LocalDate.of(2014, 1, 12))))\n        .build();\n  }\n\n .paymentOnDefault(PaymentOnDefault.NONE)\n            .protectionStart(ProtectionStartOfDay.NONE)\n            .paymentSchedule(PeriodicSchedule.builder()\n                .startDate(date(2017, 6, .rollConvention(RollConventions.IMM)\n                .businessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.of(FOLLOWING, GBLO))\n                .build())\n            .stepinDateOffset(DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(2, GBLO))\n            .settlementDateOffset(DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(2, GBLO))\n            .build())\n        .upfrontFee(\n            AdjustablePayment.of(\n                CurrencyAmount.of(GBP, -1000),\n                AdjustableDate.of(date(2017, 6, 3), BusinessDayAdjustment.of(MODIFIED_FOLLOWING, GBLO))))\n        .build();\n   .put(\"Id Scheme\", \"OG\")\n        .put(\"Id\", \"123456\")\n        .put(\"Buy Sell\", \"Buy\")\n        .put(\"Fixed Rate\", \"5\")\n        .put(\"Currency\", \"GBP\")\n .stubConvention(StubConvention.SMART_INITIAL)\n            .build())\n        .build();\n    return CdsIndexTrade.builder()\n        .info(TradeInfo.builder()\n            .id(StandardId.of(\"OG\", \"123451\"))\n            .tradeDate(date(2017, 6, 1))\n            .build())\n        .product(cdsIndex)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  private CdsIndexTrade expectedCdsIndex1() {\n    StandardId //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void test_load_filtered() {\n    TradeCsvLoader test = TradeCsvLoader.standard();\n void test_load_resolver() {\n    AtomicInteger fraCount = new AtomicInteger();\n    AtomicInteger termCount = new AtomicInteger();\n    TradeCsvInfoResolver resolver = new TradeCsvInfoResolver() {\n      @Override\n      public FraTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, FraTrade trade) {\n        fraCount.incrementAndGet();\n        return trade;\n      }\n\n      @Override\n      public TermDepositTrade completeTrade(CsvRow row, TermDepositTrade trade) {\n        termCount.incrementAndGet();\n        return trade;\n      }\n\n      @Override\n      public ReferenceData getReferenceData() {\n        return ReferenceData.standard();\n      }\n    };\n    TradeCsvLoader test = TradeCsvLoader.of(resolver);\n    test.parse(ImmutableList.of(FILE.getCharSource()));\n    assertThat(fraCount.get()).isEqualTo(3);\n    assertThat(termCount.get()).isEqualTo(3);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Test\n  public void parseOtherTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n        foundType.set(typeUpper);\n        return Optional.empty();\n      }\n    });\n    ValueWithFailures<List<Trade>> trades = test.parse(ImmutableList.of(CharSource.wrap(\"Strata Trade Type\\nFoo\")));\n\n    assertThat(foundType.get()).isEqualTo(\"FOO\");\n    assertThat(trades.getFailures()).hasSize(1);\n    FailureItem };\n    TradeCsvLoader test = TradeCsvLoader.of(new TradeCsvInfoResolver() {\n      @Override\n      public ReferenceData getReferenceData() {\n        return ReferenceData.standard();\n      }\n\n      @Override\n      public Optional<Trade> parseOtherTrade(String typeUpper, CsvRow row, TradeInfo info) {\n        return Optional.of(trade);\n      }\n    });\n    ValueWithFailures<List<Trade>> ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade}.\n   */\n  private final FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations calc;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   * <p>\n   * In most cases, applications should use the {@link #DEFAULT} instance.\n   * \n   * @param blackPricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade} using Black\n   * @param vannaVolgaPricer  the pricer for {@link vannaVolgaPricer) {\n    this.calc = new FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(blackPricer, vannaVolgaPricer);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value across one or more scenarios.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup,\n      FxOptionMarketDataLookup fxLookup,\n      ScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.presentValue(\n        trade,\n        ratesLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        fxLookup.marketDataView(marketData),\n        method);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value for a single set of market data.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the market data\n   * @param volatilities RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    return calc.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates present value sensitivity across one or more scenarios.\n   * <p>\n   * This is the sensitivity of present value to a one basis point shift in the calibrated curves.\n   * The result is the sum of the sensitivities of all affected curves.\n   * \n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesLookup  the lookup used to query the market data\n   * @param fxLookup  the lookup used to query the option market data\n   * @param marketData  the market data\n   * @param method  the pricing method\n   * @return the present value sensitivity, one entry per scenario\n   */\n  public MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENCY_EXPOSURE Currency exposure}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#CURRENT_CASH Current cash}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED Vega market quote bucketed on volatility curves/surfaces}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#RESOLVED_TARGET Resolved trade}\n * </ul>\n * <p>\n * The \"natural\" currency is the market convention base currency of the underlying FX.\n */\npublic class FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction\n    implements CalculationFunction<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The calculations by measure.\n   */\n  private static final ImmutableMap<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation> CALCULATORS =\n      ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\n          .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::presentValue)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.CURRENCY_EXPOSURE, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currencyExposure)\n          .put(Measures.OPTION_DELTA, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::delta)\n          .put(Measures.CURRENT_CASH, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::currentCash)\n          .put(Measures.VEGA_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::vegaMarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, m, meth) -> rt)\n          .build();\n\n  private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   */\n  public FxEuropeanOptionTradeCalculationFunction() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Class<FxEuropeanOptionTrade> targetType() {\n    return FxEuropeanOptionTrade.class;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(FxEuropeanOptionTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair().getBase();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FunctionRequirements requirements(\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // extract data from product\n    FxEuropeanOption product = trade.getProduct();\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = product.getCurrencyPair();\n\n    // use lookup to build requirements\n    RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FunctionRequirements ratesReqs = ratesLookup.requirements(\n        ImmutableSet.of(currencyPair.getBase(), currencyPair.getCounter()));\n    FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FunctionRequirements optionReqs = optionLookup.requirements(currencyPair);\n    return ratesReqs.combinedWith(optionReqs);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      FxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // expand the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n    ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n    RatesMarketDataLookup ratesLookup = parameters.getParameter(RatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData = ratesLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n    FxOptionMarketDataLookup optionLookup = parameters.getParameter(FxOptionMarketDataLookup.class);\n    FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData = optionLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n    FxEuropeanOptionMethod method = parameters.findParameter(FxEuropeanOptionMethod.class).orElse(FxEuropeanOptionMethod.BLACK);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // calculate one measure\n  private Result<?> calculate(\n      Measure measure,\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\n    if (calculator == null) {\n      return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for FxEuropeanOptionTrade: {}\", measure);\n    }\n    return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, ratesMarketData, optionMarketData, method));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @FunctionalInterface\n  interface SingleMeasureCalculation {\n    public abstract Object calculate(\n        ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n        RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n        FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n        FxEuropeanOptionMethod method);\n  }\n\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":27,"oldLines":7,"newStart":27,"newLines":7,"lines":[" import com.opengamma.strata.measure.rate.RatesScenarioMarketData;"," import vanilla option trades.\n * <p>\n * Each method corresponds to a measure, typically calculated by one or more calls to the pricer.\n */\nfinal class FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations DEFAULT = new FxEuropeanOptionMeasureCalculations(\n      BlackFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT,\n      VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer.DEFAULT);\n  /**\n   * The market quote sensitivity calculator.\n   */\n  private static final MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator MARKET_QUOTE_SENS =   VannaVolgaFxEuropeanOptionTradePricer vannaVolgaPricer) {\n    this.blackPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(blackPricer, \"blackPricer\");\n    this.vannaVolgaPricer = ArgChecker.notNull(vannaVolgaPricer, \"vannaVolgaPricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates present value for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> presentValue(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // present value for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated sum PV01 for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01RatesCalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return paramSens.total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        ratesMarketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n            trade,\n            ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // calibrated bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01RatesCalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates market quote bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01RatesMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities paramSens = pointSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, volatilities, method);\n    return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(paramSens, ratesProvider).multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  // point sensitivity\n  private CurrencyParameterSensitivities pointSensitivity(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    PointSensitivities pointSens;\n checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      pointSens = blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityRatesStickyStrike(\n          trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n    return ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // vega for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities vegaMarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      BlackFxOptionSmileVolatilities blackSmileVols = checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities);\n      PointSensitivities pointSens =\n          vannaVolgaPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackSmileVols);\n      return blackSmileVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n    } else {\n      BlackFxOptionVolatilities blackVols = checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities);\n      PointSensitivities pointSens =\n          blackPricer.presentValueSensitivityModelParamsVolatility(trade, ratesProvider, blackVols);\n      return blackVols.parameterSensitivity(pointSens);\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates currency exposure for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair      ratesMarketData.scenario(i).ratesProvider(),\n            optionMarketData.scenario(i).volatilities(currencyPair),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // currency exposure for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount currencyExposure(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkVannaVolgaVolatilities(volatilities));\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.currencyExposure(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates delta for all scenarios\n  DoubleScenarioArray delta(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    CurrencyPair currencyPair = trade.getProduct().getCurrencyPair();\n    return DoubleScenarioArray.of(\n ratesProvider,\n      FxOptionVolatilities volatilities,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      throw new IllegalArgumentException(\n          \"FX vanilla option Vanna Volga pricer does not currently support delta calculation\");\n    } else {\n      return blackPricer.delta(trade, ratesProvider, checkBlackVolatilities(volatilities));\n    }\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates current cash for all scenarios\n  CurrencyScenarioArray currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      RatesScenarioMarketData ratesMarketData,\n      FxOptionScenarioMarketData optionMarketData,\n ratesMarketData.scenario(i).getValuationDate(),\n            method));\n  }\n\n  // current cash for one scenario\n  CurrencyAmount currentCash(\n      ResolvedFxEuropeanOptionTrade trade,\n      LocalDate valuationDate,\n      FxEuropeanOptionMethod method) {\n\n    if (method == FxEuropeanOptionMethod.VANNA_VOLGA) {\n      return vannaVolgaPricer.currentCash(trade, valuationDate);\n    }
